title: turraea mombassana subsp. schliebenii
intro: Turraea mombassana subsp. schliebenii, commonly known as the medicinal Turraea, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Turraea mombassana subsp. schliebenii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
